subcodes.first_line: O Ali! God willing, mayest thou be blessed by the sweet fragrances of the Days of God and, through His Name, drink from the ocean of wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای علی انشاء الله بنفحات ایام الهی فائز باشی و باسمش از دریای دانائی بیاشامی
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @alchemy; the elixir, @predictions and prophecies, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause
